name: Australian Clinical Labs Limited
analysis: ACL's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 24% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$2.2100. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$2.2100, stop A$1.9701, target A$2.6531 (1.85:1) — then trail it.
